diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I can't log in anymore. My account is locked and I don't know why.
[Agent] I can help with account recovery. To start, I'll need your UID to look up the account.
[Caller] I don't have it. I can't get into the game to see it, and it's not written down anywhere.
[Agent] I understand. Per our Account Recovery Policy, I need the UID to proceed with recovery. Could you check any email receipts from past top-ups? The UID is typically included.
[Caller] I've never topped up. I'm a free-to-play player.
[Agent] Ah, I see. In that case, do you have access to the email on file? I could send a UID reminder there.
[Caller] No, I lost access to that email a year ago. That's part of why I'm locked out.
[Agent] I'm sorry to hear that. Per policy, I need either the UID or verified email access to proceed with account recovery. Without either one, I'm unable to look up your account on this call.
[Caller] So there's nothing you can do?
[Agent] Per our current policy, that is correct. I can transfer you to a supervisor, but they will follow the same procedure. Would you like me to transfer?
[Caller] I guess, yeah. This is really frustrating.
[Agent] I understand. Transferring you now. Please hold.
[Caller] OK.
[Agent] Thank you for holding. You'll be connected to a supervisor shortly.
